uplink.description: 0x6a Comfort CO2 data, two samples (newest-first); newest -> air.*, older -> samples
Single sample with status flags set (frameCounter 1, lowBattery, configurationDone)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds single-sample frame; expected.data produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (status byte 0x23 -> frameCounter 1, lowBattery, configurationDone; temp 0x00C6/10=19.8, hum 45, CO2 0x01E0=480).
Synthetic in-bounds frame; expected.data produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (temp 0xFFCE = -50/10 = -5.0 C, hum 40, CO2 0x01C2 = 450).

uplink.description: Timestamped frame (status bit 0x04 set) -> RFC3339 time
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame; wire-format values confirmed by running reference/upstream-codec.js (temp 0x00DC/10=22.0, hum 55, CO2 0x02BC=700, trailing 4-byte timestamp raw 0 -> Adeunis epoch 2013-01-01). Upstream emits the timestamp without a Z; we normalize to an RFC3339 'time' with the Z suffix.

uplink.description: Unsupported frame code returns an error
uplink._note: Synthetic; the 0x30 daily-statistics frame is not normalized (upstream returns it under data.bytes, but our normalized codec only emits the 0x6a measurement frame).
